_comment: Mother Science clinical-luxury Vignette (V-CARD) — the worked example. Copy to config.json and edit. Cutouts over a kinetic BG (T2V here; try bg_source=pexels FIRST for the cost lever) + cold-open card + carousel + annotated end card + instrumental music. 1080x1920 9:16, ~10.5s, no VO. See PIPELINE.md for field→script mapping. The reference scripts are hard-coded to these Mother Science values; this config documents the worked example (parameterize per brand).

cutouts.note: 9:16 → scale by WIDTH; 1:1 → scale by height (50-70%). Never bottom-anchor mixed shapes; always y=(H-h)/2. Alpha must be >=20% transparent, <=8% partial-edge (no halo).

pexels.note: TRY FIRST — free, native 9:16 (validated $0.66 on Clinikally). Skincare/luxury/abstract coverage is thin (~1-in-12); fall back to t2v after 2 weak passes.

bg_concepts.brief: Chrome Molecular Swarm — kinetic chrome metallic spheres on a soft cream gradient; mirrors the Malassezin ingredient viz. Real-time, camera-locked, no cuts.
Black Ink in Cream Bloom — overhead petri-style shot of black ink blooming through cream liquid; the discovery moment. Real-time, camera-locked overhead.

bg_negative_prompt: blur, distort, low quality, slow motion, slow, sluggish, jitter, camera shake, pan, zoom, cut, scene change, text, watermark, people, hands, product, static

bg_dim.note: Palette-aware. Heavy for bright/metallic/competing BGs; light for naturally-contrasty BGs. Preceded by scale=-2:1920,crop=1080:1920:(iw-1080)/2:0 for 9:16.

lines: M A L · U H · S A Y · Z I N
N O V E L   M O L E C U L E
10× MORE POWERFUL ANTIOXIDANT THAN VITAMIN C
end_card.note: Specimen-sheet, NOT a bare logo. Use logo_variant=white on dark BGs. cream = #f9f7ef.

music.prompt: Clinical-luxury skincare science vignette bed. Slow-tempo ambient minimal electronic, warm low pads + subtle high-end sparkle. Instrumental only, no vocals, no lyrics. ~90 BPM, sophisticated and quiet. Builds subtly with a single sparkling synth note in the last 2s for the end-card reveal. Augustinus Bader / La Mer luxury mood.
music.note: Generate ~20% longer than duration_s, trim. Mux in a SEPARATE pass with -map 0:v:0 -map 1:a:0.

captions.note: no VO — the cold-open card + carousel + annotated end card carry the copy

end_card.note: annotated specimen-sheet end card, default on
